findings.recommendation: Review for extraction candidates before the file reaches the hard budget.
findings.stop_condition: Root manifest is at or below 80 lines or documented as intentionally dense.
findings.title: Root manifest exceeds 80-line warning budget

findings.recommendation: Use claudeMdExcludes or consolidate nested manifests where inheritance creates bloat or conflict.
findings.stop_condition: Nested manifests are intentionally included or excluded by settings.
findings.title: Nested CLAUDE.md files may add inherited context

findings.evidence: No paths key detected in YAML frontmatter.
findings.recommendation: Add precise paths frontmatter unless this is an intentionally global habit file.
findings.stop_condition: Rule file has paths frontmatter or a clear global label.
findings.title: Rule file lacks paths frontmatter

findings.evidence: Nested CLAUDE.md files exist and settings lack claudeMdExcludes.
findings.recommendation: Add claudeMdExcludes for irrelevant inherited manifests in complex repositories.
findings.stop_condition: Exclusion policy exists or nested manifests are confirmed relevant.
findings.title: claudeMdExcludes missing with nested CLAUDE.md files

findings.evidence: - Tier 0 changes are generated trace summaries, metrics snapshots, and proposal records that do not alter runtime behavior; they may be created automatically when they are git-trackable and reversible.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite as an affirmative imperative with a measurable target behavior.
findings.stop_condition: The replacement line states the desired action and includes a verification condition where applicable.
findings.title: Negative phrasing found in operational instructions

findings.evidence: - Prefer one rule file for one concern; don't duplicate the same directive in multiple places.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite as an affirmative imperative with a measurable target behavior.
findings.stop_condition: The replacement line states the desired action and includes a verification condition where applicable.
findings.title: Negative phrasing found in operational instructions

findings.evidence: - Never write to opinion memory without a confidence score.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite as an affirmative imperative with a measurable target behavior.
findings.stop_condition: The replacement line states the desired action and includes a verification condition where applicable.
findings.title: Negative phrasing found in operational instructions

findings.recommendation: Set disableSkillShellExecution true in managed or project settings when inline shell in skills is outside policy.
findings.stop_condition: Policy is explicit in settings or documented as intentionally permissive.
findings.title: Skill shell execution is not explicitly disabled
